item.title: Memes/tomfoolery
item.description:
When I was in kindergarten my much older cousin asked what my favorite color was. I'll never forget how visible troubled he looked when I said "I don't know, orange?"
I don't get it, but my s/o said it's unsettling.
I have a cooling pillow and a ceiling fan that came off a Louisiana swamp boat.
"you're the dog now, man!"
-there is no courage without fear -chicks dig scars -never be too proud to talk yourself out of making a huge mistake
Mine's a watermelon, always has been!
Paper airplane contest?
item.dc:creator: stonetemplefox05

item.title: "It's better to say anything than to say nothing"
item.dc:creator: chukyrlaw

item.title: Found another one in the wild, just before destruction...
item.description: This is an interesting permutation of our latest bot problem. First it shows a picture with viral possibility, then a completely unrelated and completely made up conspiracy story about AI controlling the world, followed by yet another @ trap link. I tried to go back and get a less shitlordy crop job (I think it was at ~33 points?), but it had already been nuked. User had no comments or favorites, and this was their first post. Posting this for timeline documentation and awareness.
item.dc:creator: TheSecondPiewackit

item.dc:creator: FrankTheKitten

item.title: How I quit my job on the 4th.
item.description: Cracker Barrel for anyone wondering, retail sales. And yes that’s the group chat on WhatsApp that was “highly encouraged.” Also yes, they really did give us a pizza party, along with other placations (to the sum of 2 cups, 1 sweater, 2 sandwiches, and 1 plate of spaghetti in 19 months). Also the manager wanted everyone to lie to customers who needed to return something by saying the system was down, because she didn’t want her sales number to go down. There was so much more, but I’m done with this rant to the void. I hate this timeline.
item.dc:creator: MooQueen

item.title: Good morning
item.description: Ouch. So, Frank was meowing last night, so I came into the bathroom to sit with him. Long story short, I feel asleep. On the bathroom floor. Like I was 24 again, sleeping off an unfortunate choice of Irish car bombs with a Goldschläger chaser. Uh...Tiny octopus is NOT 24 anymore. Everything hurts. But look at that little face. Going to take some advil and get some sleep in my own bed.
item.dc:creator: FrankTheKitten

item.dc:creator: nevermas

item.title: Sunday is a day of rest - A day we all love the best - No work to do, no boss to impress - Just laze around in your Sunday dress.
item.description:
The morning starts with a cup of tea, Sitting on the couch, feeling carefree, Binge-watching shows on TV, That’s how Sundays are meant to be.
The breakfast is always grand, With pancakes, waffles and toast at hand, Eggs, bacon, and sausages too, All this food just for me and you.
Then we plan to do something fun, Like a walk in the park under the sun, Or maybe a movie, or a game to play, Whatever we do, it’s a Sunday Funday.
But sometimes we’re too lazy to go out, We’d rather stay in, there’s no doubt, Reading books or playing board games, That’s how we spend our Sundays without any shames.
And then comes the afternoon, We’re full from lunch, feeling immune, To any kind of work or chores, Our Sunday relaxation is what we adore.
So we take a nap, or watch a nap-themed show, And dream about places we’d like to go, Maybe the beach or the mountains high, On Sunday, we can dream and fly.
But before we know it, it’s evening time, And we start to feel a little prime, The weekend’s almost over, the work week looms, But we don’t want to leave our Sunday rooms.
And then it’s time to hit the hay, To end our lazy, relaxing day. SOURCE: https://www.instagram.com/t_oo_r_oo/ POEM: "Sunday Poem" by Wayne Anderson
item.dc:creator: stardustLUST

item.title: 14 normal memes
item.description: Hey, did you know my sole reason for meme posting is to get you to listen to my band? Help a shameless musician out by listening to the songs on mute 2-3000 times while doing the laundry. https://open.spotify.com/artist/19ptBf1ldxSQLo60aDiso7?si=P1bBQOm7SDGGyztTkuqEuw What kind of music is it you ask? Standar Norwegian rock. Best regards - me
item.dc:creator: Taltaron
